name: Where on Earth Is Carmen Sandiego?
original_name: Where on Earth Is Carmen Sandiego?
overview: It's all up to you. You must gather clues, note locations and facts, and finally fit all the clues together to help catch the greatest criminal mastermind in history--none other than the infamous Carmen Sandiego. She's bold, beautiful, and until now, uncatchable. But with your help, the ACME Detective agency might just have a chance at bringing her in.

trailers.title: Where on Earth Is Carmen Sandiego? - Opening Intro Theme Song - 1994 (HD)
